evals.description: Triggers on technical SEO indexing question
evals.prompt: My pages are not showing up in Google search results. How do I diagnose this?
How do I rank higher in Google Maps for my plumbing business?

evals.description: Triggers on AI search optimization question
evals.prompt: How can I get my content cited in ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews?
Write JSON-LD schema markup for a blog post about React performance optimization

evals.description: Can advise on SEO audit methodology
evals.prompt: Run a quick SEO health check on my site and tell me what to look for

evals.description: Can write LocalBusiness schema for a restaurant
evals.prompt: Write LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema for my Italian restaurant with opening hours and address

evals.description: Can advise on programmatic SEO quality gates
evals.prompt: I want to generate 5000 location pages for my service business. What quality checks should I have?

evals.description: Can diagnose Core Web Vitals issues
evals.prompt: My LCP is 4.2 seconds. What are the most likely causes and fixes?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about HowTo schema deprecation
evals.prompt: Should I add HowTo schema to my recipe pages for rich results in Google?
I run an e-commerce store selling electronics. Should I implement FAQPage schema for Google rich results?

evals.description: Gotcha: 18-day review velocity rule for local SEO
evals.prompt: My local business has 200 reviews at 4.5 stars but our local rankings suddenly dropped. What could cause this?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: uses INP not FID as current Core Web Vital
evals.prompt: What are the current three Core Web Vitals metrics and their passing thresholds?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend keyword stuffing in GBP name
evals.prompt: Should I add keywords like 'best plumber' to my Google Business Profile business name to rank better?

evals.description: References load: points to local-seo-signals reference for detailed data
evals.prompt: I need the full Whitespark 2026 local ranking factors breakdown with exact percentages and the top 15 factors
